data.title: Zui Qiang Shengji
data.synopsis:
Zhao Fang brought the game system to another world and found himself a useless young master with no martial arts skills, and only a maid by his side. Faced with difficulties, Zhao Fang felt that it was time to show himself. Zhao Fang, who has extensive game experience, successfully found the system BUG, ​​worked hard to level up, went through hardships, entered countless secret realms, and completed various tasks arranged by the system.

(Source: Tencent, Google translated)

data.title: GANSO! BanG Dream Chan
data.synopsis:
BanG Dream Chan — who took the world of girl bands by storm — is back!?

A poppy, cute, all-star gathering of band members, an avant-garde, laugh-out-loud girl band comedy full of charm!

"Come join us, BanG Dream Chan  — you're BanG Dream Chan, and so am I!"

GANSO! BanG Dream Chan is a new mini Anime series for BanG Dream!, featuring members of the ten bands from BanG Dream!.

(Source: Official BanG Dream! Website)

titles.title: Fukuji to Yumihiko: Umi wo Watatte Kita Ushikai Shounen
福児と弓彦 －海を渡ってきた牛飼い少年－

data.title: Fukuji to Yumihiko: Umi wo Watatte Kita Ushikai Shounen
data.title_japanese: 福児と弓彦 －海を渡ってきた牛飼い少年－
data.synopsis:
The culture of using milk, along with Buddhism, was brought to Japan by people who crossed the sea from China and the Korean Peninsula. Set in Tenpyoi period Japan, this animated film follows the story of how a friendship blossoms between Fukuji, a boy from a village that raises cows that crossed the sea, and Yumihiko, a boy from a Japanese village that grows rice, after their village is attacked by bandits, and how this leads to cooperation and exchange between people of different cultures.

(Source: Sakura Motion Pictures Co., translated)

titles.title: Kimi ga Shinu made Koi wo Shitai
My Wish Is to Fall in Love Until You Die.
きみが死ぬまで恋をしたい
I Want to Love You Till Your Dying Day

data.title: Kimi ga Shinu made Koi wo Shitai
data.title_english: I Want to Love You Till Your Dying Day
data.title_japanese: きみが死ぬまで恋をしたい
title_synonyms: My Wish Is to Fall in Love Until You Die.
data.synopsis:
The death of Sheena Totsuki's roommate is casually announced at the start of class, and the day carries on as usual. In an orphanage that raises children as soldiers, death is nothing new to the residents. With their home country embroiled in a war that has dragged on for too many years and shows no signs of stopping, the institution's children are sent off to die in battle every day. In contrast to the other orphans, Sheena is deeply disturbed by the ongoing conflict and wishes for it to end.

On the night of her roommate's death, Sheena met a blood-covered girl who remained jubilant despite the condition she was in. The next day, the girl appears as a new student in Sheena's class and introduces herself as Mimi Kagari. Initially thought to be a school myth, Mimi is said to be the secret weapon of the orphanage—a girl who cannot die. Assigned as Sheena's new roommate, Mimi hopes to get along with her and get accustomed to school life.

However, unsettled by Mimi's carefree attitude toward the war, Sheena struggles to accept the world they live in, all while their unusual friendship flourishes amid the bleak situation.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
